projects.title: Parlez
projects.description: A web app for learning French with AI conversation practice, smart vocabulary cards, and personalized review sessions. Built from a personal obsession with the French language and a frustration with existing tools.

projects.title: Content Creation SKILL
projects.description: A Claude Code skill for AI-assisted content creation — structures narratives, adapts tone, and generates drafts for Chinese social media. Designed around the build-in-public workflow.

projects.title: HoopyAI Knowledge Hub
projects.description: Visual explainers for AI concepts — each topic has AI-generated image galleries and the exact prompts that created them. This site's knowledge-sharing engine.

projects.title: 古诗词 AI Companion
projects.description: An AI companion for exploring Chinese classical poetry — translation, annotation, imagery analysis, and modern interpretations. Currently in the planning stage.

projects.title: AI Research SKILL
projects.description: A Claude Code skill for deep-diving into AI papers and concepts — summarizes arxiv papers, builds concept maps, and generates visual explanations. Powers the Knowledge Hub content pipeline.

projects.title: Data Pipeline Agent
projects.description: A TypeScript agent that analyzes data pipeline code, suggests optimizations, and auto-generates documentation. Built for internal tooling use cases.
